bullet_points: Load the dataset, treating '.' as NaN.
Recode binary variables (QHD, QGM, QF, QED_1, QKC, QGH) to 0/1.
Map ordinal Likert scales (QEA, QEB, QGP, QGU, QKB_1, QGO) to numeric integers (-2 to +2), explicitly mapping "Not sure" to NaN.
Document and print missingness rates for all variables.
Construct country-specific ordinal income ranks by identifying the populated QDF_* column per respondent and ranking within each country.
Construct composite indices: Job Security (current/future) and Nature of Work Change (past/future).
Save the cleaned, harmonized dataset to disk.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Data Cleaning, Harmonization, and Index Construction

bullet_points: Perform EFA on the 16 binary QHD items using a tetrachoric correlation matrix; determine factor retention via parallel analysis/scree plot and save the scree plot.
Compute the gap between QKB_1 (importance) and QKB_2 (actual practice) for the 11 enabler items and print these gaps.
Perform PCA on the gap scores to create an "Organizational Support Index."
Calculate McDonald’s omega for factor consistency.
Save the resulting factor scores and indices.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Affective Disposition Dimensionality Reduction and Organizational Support Indexing

bullet_points: Perform Ordinal Logistic Regression to predict job security outcomes.
Include the Organizational Support Index, Affective Disposition scores, and the QKB_1_4 × QKB_1_11 interaction term.
Include a quadratic term for the Task Transformation Index to test for U-shaped relationships.
Include agentic AI (QKD) as a moderator.
Compute VIF for all predictors (flag > 5) and report standardized beta coefficients, 95% CIs, and FDR-adjusted p-values.
Perform sensitivity analysis by comparing models with and without the "Not sure" (uninformed) segment.
Train a Random Forest regressor to identify top 20 feature importances via permutation importance.
Conduct mediation analysis (SEM) testing the indirect path: Organizational Support Index → Task Transformation Indices → Job Security, using 1000+ bootstrap samples.
Save all statistical outputs and model performance metrics.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Random Forest, Mediation, and Subgroup Analysis

bullet_points: Generate a heatmap of Spearman rank correlations between top predictors and outcomes.
Create a forest plot of standardized regression coefficients.
Plot Random Forest permutation importance scores.
Visualize mediation paths with standardized effect sizes.
Generate a grouped bar chart comparing mean Job Security Index scores across generations, job profiles, and countries with 95% CIs.
Save all plots as high-resolution PNG files.
Interpret statistical results, focusing on the interaction between employee involvement and regular training.
Frame results around the trajectory classes (Resiliently Optimistic, Anxiously Declining, Stagnant Neutral).
Include a dedicated subsection on sensitivity analyses (treatment of "Not sure" responses).
Report all key numerical results, effect sizes, and confidence intervals.
Synthesize findings into a comprehensive Results section for the research paper.
